flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Adelphi University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.5k → $49.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Adelphi University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.5k → $49.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Adelphi University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
